title: System Map: Easily Visualize Board Functionality and Relationships Between Boards
excerpt:
As our monday-based system has become increasingly complex, we are realizing that a hurdle in iterating on the system functionality is that we lack a simple way to visualize the system we’ve built in it’s current state. 
…

posts.author: Paul_marcstone (Paul Doffing)
posts.cookedHtml:
As our monday-based system has become increasingly complex, we are realizing that a hurdle in iterating on the system functionality is that we lack a simple way to visualize the system we’ve built in it’s current state.

We’d request a a dashboard/ exportable .csv that show the relationships between our various boards, including automations, integrations, mirrors, etc. by board.

Then we could iterate actively on the functionality of the whole system.

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Paul,

This sounds like a very interesting use case. I’m a monday app developer with focus on building visual addons like mind mapping and birds eye view

Would love to connect with you and get a better understanding of the system map that you have in mind. Please feel free to schedule a discovery session at a convenient time
